results.title: 05 mango crew tactile redesign
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 controls the mango species: irregular leaning mango-fruit body, tiny nub hands and feet, dot eyes, tiny mouth, warm yellow-orange translucent gummy material, and handmade miniature-set charm. Remove its pink bleacher prop and group arrangement. Image 2 controls only the turntable layout; do not copy its larger mascot limbs, leaf cap, or polished generic face. OUTPUT — one consistent mango helper shown in full-body front, three-quarter front, strict side, and back views, plus small hauling and cheering action callouts. Preserve the minimal face and almost-limbless proportions from Image 1. Identical soft studio light across all views. AVOID — character labels, signs, separate accessories, human anatomy, bear ears, clothing, large arms, large shoes, plastic-toy finish.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create a clean reference-ready character turntable. Image 1 is the character-design authority; preserve its appealing proportions, personality, face simplicity, and tactile material. Image 2 is layout authority only. Show the same character consistently across angles on a plain off-white studio background. No environment, human figures, packaging, captions, labels, borders, watermark, or unrelated redesign.

results.title: 06 grape familiar gentle redesign
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 controls the familiar's gentle oddness, small triangular jelly body, tiny feet, simple friendly face, enveloping pointed hood, and handmade tactile charm. Remove its blue platform and fuzzy cloth material. Image 2 controls only the turntable layout; do not copy its villain eyes, round body, or hard plastic polish. OUTPUT — redesign the same gentle creature entirely as deep grape-violet translucent gummy candy. Its hood and short cape are a thinner peeled grape-skin layer of the same edible jelly, clearly translucent and stretchy rather than fabric. Show full-body front, three-quarter front, strict side, and back views, plus small dramatic-bow and joyful-swan-dive action callouts. Identical soft studio light across all views. AVOID — green body, fabric, scarf, sinister expression, horns, wings, demon anatomy, bear shape, labels, scene props, human figures.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create a clean reference-ready character turntable. Image 1 is the character-design authority; preserve its appealing proportions, personality, face simplicity, and tactile material. Image 2 is layout authority only. Show the same character consistently across angles on a plain off-white studio background. No environment, human figures, packaging, captions, labels, borders, watermark, or unrelated redesign.
